# Hogsend Courses

> Free and paid, code-first courses on PostHog, lifecycle messaging, and
> turning traffic into an audience you own — from the team behind Hogsend
> (source-available lifecycle email for teams on PostHog). Written for
> technical founders, growth engineers, and the consultants who set this up
> for them. The flagship course, "Measure, Keep, and Grow", is a
> start-to-finish growth program on PostHog + Hogsend with quizzes, videos,
> calculators, and interactive workbooks.
> Built by Doug Silkstone (https://withseismic.com).

## Start here
- [All courses](https://course.hogsend.com)
- [Pricing](https://course.hogsend.com/pricing)

## Courses
- [Measure, Keep, and Grow](https://course.hogsend.com/growth-with-posthog)
- [Becoming a Product Team](https://course.hogsend.com/becoming-a-product-team)

## About
- [Hogsend](https://hogsend.com)
- [Documentation](https://docs.hogsend.com)
- [Built by withseismic.com](https://withseismic.com)
